name: PT Victoria Insurance Tbk
summary: PT Victoria Insurance Tbk provides general insurance products and services in Indonesia. The company offers fire, motor vehicle, marine transportation, engineering, surety bond, personal accident, health, hull, liability, property, and freight insurance products. It serves finance, banking, state-owned enterprise, and private and individual customers. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Victoria Insurance Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Victoria Investama Tbk.
